text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It was such an important opportunity. I can't believe I couldn't stay in front.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wonder... Should I come up with a strategy for
when my opponents surge ahead late or close the
gap at the very end?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Just front run even faster next time! Going full
turbo's always the way to do it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I never want to give up the view from the very
front... Is it different for you, Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, you're right... I want to stay ahead of the
pack too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, you two! I feel like I can try even harder
now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! There's no way I'll miss out at the next kids'
clothing sale!
